zh.lifeSummary: Richard Wyllys Esq是Sir Ambrosius Willis和Agneta Coles的兒子，於1573年出生在英國瓦維其可爾分尼 康普頓。他於大約1588年與Hester De Williamscott在英國英格蘭結婚。他去世於1597年6月10日在他的家鄉享年24歲，埋葬在英國瓦維其可爾分尼 康普頓聖 彼得 安德 聖 可拉也斯 邱奇。

nameMeanings.name: Wyllys
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Willis
meanings: variant of Will with genitival -s. This surname represents a retention of the second syllable, introduced by the addition of the Middle English genitival suffix -es, which would have been pronounced in the Middle English period. Compare Wills . In some cases the name is a variant of Willey , with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s.

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

variants.name: Rikert

It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

en.lifeSummary: Richard Wyllys Esq was born in 1573, in Fenny Compton, Warwickshire, England as the son of Sir Ambrosius Willis and Agneta Coles. He married Hester De Williamscott about 1588, in England, United Kingdom. He died on 10 June 1597, in his hometown, at the age of 24, and was buried in St Peter And St Clare's Church, Fenny Compton, Warwickshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Richard Wyllys Esq est né en 1573, à Fenny Compton, Warwickshire, Angleterre, fils de Sir Ambrosius Willis et Agneta Coles. Il a épousé Hester De Williamscott environ 1588, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Il est décédé le 10 juin 1597, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 24 ans, et a été enterré à St Peter And St Clare's Church, Fenny Compton, Warwickshire, Angleterre.

Morì il 10 giugno 1597, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 24 anni, e fu sepolto a St Peter And St Clare's Church, Fenny Compton, Warwickshire, England.

ko.St Peter And St Clare's Church, Fenny Co: 영국 워윅실르 펜이 콤프턴 스트 피터 앤드 스트 클래레'스 처르치
ko.lifeSummary: Richard Wyllys Esq(은)는 1573년 영국 워윅실르 펜이 콤프턴에서 Sir Ambrosius Willis(와)과 Agneta Coles의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 대략 1588년 영국 잉글랜드에서 Hester De Williamscott(와)과 결혼했다. 그는 1597년 6월 10일 그의 고향에서 24세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 워윅실르 펜이 콤프턴 스트 피터 앤드 스트 클래레'스 처르치에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Richard Wyllys Esq nasceu em 1573, em Fenny Compton, Warwickshire, Inglaterra filho de Sir Ambrosius Willis e Agneta Coles. Ele casou-se com Hester De Williamscott aproximadamente 1588, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ele faleceu em 10 de junho de 1597, em sua cidade natal, com 24 anos, e foi sepultado em St Peter And St Clare's Church, Fenny Compton, Warwickshire, Inglaterra.

ru.St Peter And St Clare's Church, Fenny Co: ст питир анд ст кларе'с чурч, фенни комптон, варвиккшир, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Richard Wyllys Esq родился в 1573 г. в местности фенни комптон, варвиккшир, Англия. Его родителей звали Sir Ambrosius Willis и Agneta Coles. Он женился на женщине по имени Hester De Williamscott около 1588 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. Он умер 10 июня 1597 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 24 лет и был похоронен в местности ст питир анд ст кларе'с чурч, фенни комптон, варвиккшир, Англия.
